ShortDescription.Value: Finally a simple way to adjust pricing of the stuff in-game!

Publish.LongDescription:
Is your city drowning in millions of bucks? Do you want to change how much you spend on roads? Well, **now you can!**
## Features - adjust pricing of roads & track building! - set prices individually for normal roads and highways - set prices individually for train, tram & subway tracks - tweak pricing manually or choose from three included presets (Vanilla, Balanced, Realistic) - adjust pricing of road & track upkeep! - set upkeep individually for normal roads and highways - set upkeep individually for train, tram & subway tracks - more to come!
## Planned features - adjust prices based on network elevation - custom tunnel/bridge pricing - other network pricing - landscaping pricing - pricing of roundabouts, cul-de-sacs etc.
## Compatibility note This mod should be compatible with any other mods & assets. All prices are modified at runtime; when you remove the mod, all prices should go back to vanilla values.
Kudos to [u/dorin21](https://www.reddit.com/user/dorin21/) for sourcing a [resourceful dataset](https://www.reddit.com/r/CitiesSkylines2/comments/1p67ptr/adjusted_infrastructure_costs) to base the presets on!
